haiku.text: Validation does not pass this off as a normal pass. Since the diff is UI-relevant but no flow is registered for this repo, feature-validate records an explicit skip reason (a coverage gap: no flow registered for this repo) in the verify_ui block of validate-{N}.json. No gate-metric record is written either way, but the skip reason keeps the coverage gap visible instead of silently treating it as passed.
